message:
test: add comprehensive coverage for fsfs update verification path (#14)

Add 28 unit tests covering the four areas identified in issue #14:

1. Version subcommand verification: confirms `version` subcommand (not
   `--version` flag) is used, valid output passes, errors fail gracefully,
   and nonexistent binaries return proper errors.

2. Checksum verification: SHA-256 match/mismatch detection, case-insensitive
   comparison, missing file error handling, binary-mode `*` prefix in
   SHA256SUMS, empty/malformed content, and missing checksum file not
   falsely reported as "verified".

3. Platform detection: all supported platform triples (linux x86_64,
   linux aarch64, macos x86_64, macos aarch64), asset name construction
   for all platforms including Windows, v-prefix stripping, and runtime
   triple detection validation.

4. Self-test error handling: failure output captured (not masked),
   both stdout and stderr captured, trusted URL validation, archive
   path safety (absolute paths, parent traversal), and temp dir uniqueness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
